arts.ttl: Luis Palma Celtic transfer exit route takes major twist as FIFA intervention hits Rayo Vallecano hard
arts.sum: The wide man is expected to leave the champions this month

arts.ttl: Brendan Rodgers addresses Kyogo Furuhashi 'gossip' with firm transfer message to his Celtic players
arts.sum: Brendan Rodgers was in no mood to entertain the possibility that any of his players actively wanted to leave Celtic, but if there were any, the Hoops gaffer delivered a message to them. Brendan Rodgers addressed the Kyogo rumours over the weekend and today, the Celtic manager clarified how the talismanic striker is doing ahead of the Parkhead club’s trip to Dundee tomorrow night.

arts.ttl: Brendan Rodgers provides Celtic injury update on Nicolas Kuhn and Daizen Maeda
arts.sum: It was a strong afternoon for the league leaders with manager Brendan Rodgers testing how his players deal with the pressure in big moments during Scottish Premiership action. Nicolas Kuhn and Daizen Maeda both missed Celtic’s clash with Ross County over the weekend.

arts.ttl: Harry Redknapp admits he'll 'never forget' chairman's reaction to targeting 'bonkers' Celtic player
arts.sum: Harry Redknapp admits there was a player he ‘loved’ watching at Celtic whilst at West Ham. What Harry Redknapp was told after telling West Ham he wanted former Celtic man Paulo Di Canio

arts.ttl: I trained with Celtic wearing a Rangers necklace before crossing Old Firm divide to become a title-winning star under Walter Smith
arts.sum: Few players have pulled on the green and white hoops and the red, white and blue - let alone done both by the time they were 14

arts.ttl: 'Always nice to know their taking notes': Carter-Vickers reacts to Celtic exit talk
arts.sum: Cameron Carter-Vickers has been linked with a move to the German Bundesliga.

arts.ttl: Celtic not scared of Kyogo speculation - Rodgers
arts.sum: Manager Brendan Rodgers will not stand in the way of any player who wants to leave Celtic but says Kyogo Furuhashi is unaffected by speculation.

arts.ttl: Son of Celtic fans' favourite vows to follow father's footsteps after debut
arts.sum: Son of Celtic fans' favourite vows to follow father's footsteps after debut.

arts.ttl: Rodgers outlines Celtic's transfer plans, highlights ‘something special’ within squad
arts.sum: Celtic manager Brendan Rodgers has been discussing his transfer plans.

arts.ttl: Celtic transfer off due to ‘FIFA earthquake’ – Outgoing move takes ‘unexpected turn’
arts.sum: Over the past week there’s been multiple claims from the Spanish media regarding Luis Palma and a move from Celtic to Rayo Vallecano. The Honduras international is thought to be surplus to requirement under Brendan Rodgers at Celtic and has therefore been made available on the market.
